description: Composition Grey tunic/shirt dress made of 100% cotton, has a mandarin collar, a full butoned placket with oversized buttons, cap sleeves, buttoned epaulets on the shoulder, waistband panel detail, a A-line skirt and a small slit at the centre back hem Fit Regular Wash care Rinse separately Gentle handwash in mild detergent Do not bleach or scrub on embroidery & print Line dry inside out Low iron The crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel wear it as a shirt dress and throw on a faded and worn denim jacket and a floral scarf. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
